overview: A pixel-faithful homepage clone of FWRD.com — the luxury fashion e-commerce site. Features an announcement bar, sticky header with FWRD branding and navigation, a full-width hero carousel, trending editorial cards, a featured product grid with wishlist toggling, curated shop lookbooks, and a footer with newsletter signup.
features: Sticky header with FWRD logo and navigation icons
Full-width hero carousel with 6+ editorial slides and Shop Now CTAs
Trending editorial section with hover effects
Featured product grid with designer names, prices, and wishlist hearts
Footer with newsletter signup and app download promo
Luxury black-and-white aesthetic with gradient placeholder imagery
